name: Talonrakennusalan työehtosopimus
name_en: Collective Agreement for the Building Construction Industry

scope.description: The agreement covers building construction work in Finland. It is universally binding (yleissitova), meaning it applies to all companies in the sector regardless of union membership.

_extraction_notes: The provided source text is a landing page summary from the Rakennusliitto website, not the full PDF text of the collective agreement. Consequently, specific salary tables, section references, and detailed clauses (working hours, vacation, etc.) are not present in the provided source text. The extraction is limited to the high-level information available in the provided snippet.

other_terms.universally_binding: The agreement is defined as universally binding (yleissitova), requiring all companies in the sector to follow the minimum terms.
